name: Blinding Flash
description: This invocation creates a sudden burst of intense white light, temporarily blinding everyone in its ten foot (3.0 m) radius. Victims are blinded for one to four (1D4) melee rounds, with a penalty of -5 to strike, and -10 to parry and dodge. The chance of falling is 50% every 10 ft (3.0 m). The magic can be cast up to 60 ft (18.3 m) away. Saving throw is standard; those who successfully save versus magic are not blinded.

range.summary: 10 ft (3.0 m) radius; up to 60 ft (18.3 m) away.

duration.summary: 1D4 melee rounds.

combatModifiers.notes: The chance of falling is 50% every 10 ft (3.0 m) moved.

name: Cloud of Smoke
description: This magic enables the spell caster to create a dense, billowing cloud of smoke up to 90 feet (27.4 m) away. The cloud is 30x30x30 feet (9.1 m) in size. Sight through the smoke is impossible, rendering those inside effectively blind.

duration.summary: Four melee rounds (one minute) per level of experience.

combatModifiers.notes: Sight through the smoke is impossible. Those inside suffer blindness penalties.

name: Death Trance
description: A state of mind over matter that slows the metabolism to such a degree that it simulates death. Only a careful medical examination will detect the faint heartbeat and breathing. The effects of drugs and poisons are slowed to a crawl. The mage cannot be roused until the duration expires or they choose to end it.

duration.summary: 10 melee rounds (2.5 minutes) per level of experience.

name: Globe of Daylight
description: Creates a small globe of true daylight that can be cast up to 30 feet away and will illuminate a 12 foot (3.6 m) radius. It is bright enough to read by and will ward off vampires and other entities harmed by sunlight. The globe will hover and follow the caster if commanded.

range.summary: Near self or up to 30 ft (9.1 m) away.

duration.summary: 12 melee rounds (3 minutes) per level of experience.

name: See Aura
description: All things, organic and inorganic, have an aura. The aura has a multitude of colors and patterns that indicate the true nature of the thing. This spell allows the caster to clearly see and read a target's aura.

range.summary: 60 ft (18.3 m) and must be visible.

duration.summary: One melee round (15 seconds).

reveals: Estimated level of experience (low, medium, high)
Presence of a human aberration or mutant
General health and presence of severe illness

name: See the Invisible
description: The character can see forces, objects, and creatures which can turn invisible, or are naturally invisible. Even astral bodies can be seen.

duration.summary: 1 minute (4 melees) per level of experience.

name: Sense Evil
description: This spell enables the caster to sense the presence of supernatural evil. It will indicate the general direction and proximity, but not exact location. It cannot sense evil intentions of normal people, only supernatural entities.

duration.summary: 2 minutes (8 melees) per level of experience.

reveals: General direction and proximity of evil

name: Sense Magic
description: The caster can feel the presence of magic. It indicates if magic is in use within the area, if an object is enchanted, or if someone is casting a spell. It will not indicate exactly what the magic is, but will sense its presence.

duration.summary: 2 minutes (8 melees) per level of experience.

name: Thunderclap
description: The invocation produces a booming clap of thunder that sounds as if it came from the mage. A thunderclap is an excellent means of alerting or signaling allies, as well as a means of intimidation. As an intimidation device, it will momentarily startle and distract everyone other than the spell caster.

range.summary: 30 ft (9.1 m) radius around the sorcerer; audible up to 1 mile (1.6 km).

duration.summary: Instant

name: Befuddle
description: An enchantment that temporarily confuses the victim. The character becomes disoriented, unable to focus, and sluggish in combat.

duration.summary: 2 minutes (8 melees) per level of experience.

combatModifiers.notes: Attacks per melee round are reduced by half.

name: Chameleon
description: This spell enables the character to seemingly alter the color and pattern of his clothes and physical body to blend into the surrounding environment. The mage is virtually undetectable as long as they remain completely still.

duration.summary: 4.5 minutes (18 melees) per level of experience.

grantedSkills.name: Chameleon Stealth
grantedSkills.notes: 90% undetectable if unmoving, 70% if moving 2 ft per melee or slower, 20% if moving normally. Completely ineffective in a void/empty room.

name: Climb
description: The spell magically grants exceptional climbing skill for the duration. The magic allows the character to climb almost any surface, including smooth walls, with remarkable proficiency.

range.summary: Self, or others up to 40 ft (12.2 m) away.

duration.summary: 5 minutes (20 melees) per level of experience.

grantedSkills.name: Climbing
grantedSkills.notes: 60% on smooth or extremely difficult surfaces; rappelling included.

name: Concealment
description: This spell makes a small object (under 14 inches/0.35 m in length or width) completely undetectable to normal vision. It cannot be seen unless someone physically bumps into it or uses magic to reveal it.

range.summary: Small objects up to 10 ft (3.0 m) away.

duration.summary: 5 minutes per level of experience.

save.summary: Standard (if actively searching for the item)

name: Detect Concealment
description: A spell that instantly reveals any object that has been magically or physically hidden, concealed, or disguised within the area of effect.

duration.summary: Instant

name: Extinguish Fire
description: The spell caster can instantly put out a 20 foot (6.1 m) radius of fire up to 80 feet away. A great tool for rescues and covering tracks.

range.summary: 20 ft (6.1 m) radius, up to 80 ft (24.4 m) away.

duration.summary: 1 minute (4 melees) per level of experience.

name: Fear
description: This spell creates an overwhelming sensation of terror in its victims. Those affected will either flee in panic or be temporarily paralyzed by fear.

range.summary: 20 ft (6.1 m) area, up to 100 ft (30.5 m) away.

duration.summary: 1 minute (4 melees) per level of experience.

combatModifiers.notes: Victims lose initiative and will likely flee. If cornered, they fight with extreme penalties.

name: Heavy Breathing
description: The magic creates a phantom sound of someone breathing heavily. The sound can be cast up to 60 feet away and slowly moves around to unnerve those who hear it.

duration.summary: 5 minutes per level of experience.

name: Levitation
description: The spell enables the caster to magically lift themselves, someone else, or an object into the air and hover or move horizontally.

duration.summary: 3 minutes (12 melees) per level of experience.

save.summary: Standard if used offensively on an unwilling victim.

movement.notes: Maximum weight is 200 lbs (90 kg) plus 20 lbs (9 kg) per level of experience.

name: Mystic Alarm
description: Creates an invisible, magical ward on a door, window, or container. If the warded object is opened or tampered with, a silent alarm rings in the spell caster's head.

duration.summary: One year per level of experience.

name: Turn Dead
description: Turns away animated dead (skeletons, zombies, corpses). The undead are stopped in their tracks and forced to retreat or stand absolutely still, unable to approach the spell caster.

duration.summary: 2 minutes (8 melees) per level of experience.

name: Magic Armor
description: Creates an invisible, weightless, noiseless, full suit of mystic armor upon the spell caster or other. It provides formidable protection against physical and energy attacks.

duration.summary: 4 melees (1 minute) per level of experience.

name: Breathe Without Air
description: This spell enables the character to function completely without air, whether underwater or in a toxic, oxygen-depleted environment.

duration.summary: 3 minutes (12 melees) per level of experience.

name: Energy Bolt
description: The incantation creates a bolt of energy which the mage can direct at any specific target. The spell caster must roll to strike, but is +3 to hit.

duration.summary: Instant

damage.notes: Magical directed energy attack. The caster gets a +3 bonus to strike.

name: Fingers of the Wind
description: The spell enables the caster to manipulate physical objects out of reach. Can be used to open unlocked doors, flick switches, tap shoulders, or knock over small objects.

duration.summary: 3 melee rounds per level of experience.

combatModifiers.notes: Operates with a P.S. equivalent to 5. Cannot be used to attack or parry.

name: Float in Air
description: Creates air currents that hold a person or object completely stationary in the air. Can be used to stop someone from falling or simply to hover.

range.summary: Self or others within 30 ft (9.1 m).

duration.summary: 10 melee rounds per level of experience.

movement.notes: Target is suspended in air. Movement is impossible unless pushed/pulled by an outside force.

name: Fuel Flame
description: The magic feeds an existing fire, doubling its size and the damage it inflicts.

duration.summary: Instant effect on the fire.

damage.notes: Doubles the damage inflicted by the targeted fire.

name: Ignite Fire
description: Causes a combustible object (wood, paper, cloth) to spontaneously catch fire.

duration.summary: Instant (fire burns normally thereafter).

name: Impervious to Fire
description: Makes the individual completely impervious to normal and magical fires and intense heat.

range.summary: Self or others within 60 ft (18.3 m).

duration.summary: 5 minutes (20 melees) per level of experience.

name: Impervious to Poison
description: The incantation makes the person completely impervious to all poisons, toxins, and venom.

duration.summary: 5 minutes (20 melees) per level of experience.

name: Invisibility: Simple
description: Makes the target invisible to normal vision. The magic is broken the moment the invisible person engages in combat or acts aggressively.

duration.summary: 3 minutes (12 melees) per level of experience.

combatModifiers.notes: Attackers are -5 to strike the invisible character. Engaging in combat immediately dispels the invisibility.

name: Negate Poisons/Toxins
description: Instantly neutralizes any poison or toxin in the recipient's body. Also cures the effects of drugs and alcohol.

duration.summary: Instant

name: Paralysis: Lesser
description: Temporarily paralyzes the victim's motor functions, freezing them in place. They can still see, hear, and think, but cannot physically move or speak.

duration.summary: 1 minute (4 melees) per level of experience.

combatModifiers.notes: Victim loses all attacks per melee, cannot move, and cannot cast spells requiring physical gestures or speech.

name: Resist Fire
description: Provides a partial resistance to fire, magical fires, and intense heat, cutting the damage inflicted in half.

range.summary: Self or others within 60 ft (18.3 m).

duration.summary: 10 melee rounds (2.5 mins) per level of experience.

name: Telekinesis
description: Enables the mage to manipulate objects with his mind. They can move, throw, or lift items up to 60 lbs without physical contact.

duration.summary: 1 minute (4 melees) per level of experience.

save.summary: Dodge (if attacked with a hurled object)

combatModifiers.notes: Can carry or hurl up to 60 lbs (27.2 kg). Hurled objects inflict 1D4 damage per 10 lbs of weight.

name: Carpet of Adhesion
description: Creates an ultra-sticky, invisible floor area that instantly traps victims. It is nearly impossible to pull free once stuck.

range.summary: 100 ft (30.5 m) away; 6 ft (1.8 m) radius.

duration.summary: 2 minutes (8 melees) per level of experience.

targetCountFormula: Multiple victims within the 6 ft radius.

combatModifiers.notes: Victims are stuck and immobile. Freeing oneself requires a P.S. check (must roll above the spell strength) or cutting through the adhesive.

name: Charismatic Aura
description: The caster chooses one distinct aura effect when the spell is invoked: Charm, Fear, or Authority. Each mode alters how NPCs perceive and react to the mage.

range.summary: Self; affects those within 10 ft (3.0 m).

duration.summary: 2 minutes (8 melees) per level of experience.

effectProfiles.name: Charm
effectProfiles.description: Victims regard the caster as a trusted friend.

effectProfiles.name: Fear
effectProfiles.description: Victims are intimidated by the caster's presence.

effectProfiles.name: Authority
effectProfiles.description: Victims are compelled to obey the caster's commands.

name: Energy Field
description: Creates a shimmering, spherical force field bubble around the caster or others. It provides significant S.D.C. protection.

duration.summary: 3 minutes (12 melees) per level of experience.

name: Fire Gout
description: A focused blast of fire that shoots from the caster's fingertips.

duration.summary: Instant

name: Magic Net
description: Creates a magical net that entangles and holds its target. The net has its own structural integrity.

duration.summary: 2 minutes (8 melees) per level of experience.

name: Shadow Meld
description: The caster can merge their body with a shadow, becoming virtually undetectable.

duration.summary: 10 minutes (40 melees) per level of experience.

grantedSkills.name: Shadow Stealth (Prowl)
grantedSkills.notes: Effective only in shadows or dark areas.

name: Superhuman Strength
description: Empowers the recipient with supernatural strength for the spell's duration.

duration.summary: 5 minutes (20 melees) per level of experience.

combatModifiers.notes: P.S. becomes Supernatural Strength.

name: Time Slip
description: The mage briefly steps out of the normal flow of time, creating the illusion of moving faster than the eye can follow.

duration.summary: 1D4 melee rounds.

combatModifiers.notes: Gives the illusion of superhuman speed.

name: Blind
description: Temporarily blinds the victim, impairing their combat abilities.

duration.summary: 1 minute (4 melees) per level of experience.

combatModifiers.notes: Victim cannot see; speed is reduced by half.

name: House of Glass
description: Creates a transparent, glass-like structure that traps victims or serves as a shelter.

duration.summary: 10 minutes per level of experience.

save.summary: Dodge (to jump out before it forms)

name: Metamorphosis: Animal
description: Transforms the caster into a normal animal. The caster uses the creature's physical stats and natural attacks but retains their own intelligence and alignment.

duration.summary: 10 minutes per level of experience.

formTransformation.notes: Uses wolf natural attacks and movement.

name: Teleport: Lesser
description: Instantly transports the caster to a known destination. Arrival accuracy is resolved on a percentile table based on familiarity.

range.summary: Self and 50 lbs (22.6 kg) of gear.

duration.summary: Instant.

entries.label: On Target
entries.effect: Arrive exactly at the intended destination.

entries.label: Off Course
entries.effect: Arrive 1D6 miles away from the destination.

entries.label: Catastrophic Failure
entries.effect: Arrive high in the air or teleport into an object. Take 3D6 damage.

name: Fire Ball
description: The caster hurls a large flaming sphere that inflicts massive damage upon impact.

duration.summary: Instant

name: Familiar Link
description: Creates a permanent mystical bond with an animal familiar. Success permanently reduces the caster's maximum P.P.E. and Hit Points.

permanentCosts.notes: Hit points are restored only if the familiar dies.

duration.summary: Permanent bond.

name: Invulnerability
description: Grants the caster incredible durability, a massive temporary health pool, and immunity to energy attacks.

duration.summary: 1 melee round (15 seconds) per level of experience.

name: Exorcism
description: A powerful ritual designed to expel possessing entities and demons from a host body or location.

duration.summary: Instant expulsion.

entries.label: Success
entries.effect: Success (per level of experience). The entity is banished.

entries.label: Failure
entries.effect: The entity remains. Can only be attempted once per 24 hours.

name: Summon & Control Canines
description: Calls forth actual canines (dogs, wolves) from the surrounding area and forces them to obey the caster.

duration.summary: 1 hour per level of experience.

control.summary: Animals cannot save; caster dictates actions telepathically.

duration.summary: 1 hour per level of experience.

name: Amulet
description: Enchants a precious-metal amulet that grants ongoing protection or abilities to the wearer. The amulet becomes a permanent magical item.

workspace.summary: Quiet space for chanting and metalwork.

duration.summary: Permanent.

name: Mystic Portal
description: Creates a dimensional rift that acts as a doorway through solid objects or across short distances. It can penetrate vaults, walls, and magical barriers.

duration.summary: 1 melee round (15 seconds) per level of experience.

name: Create Mummy
description: A dark ritual that animates a specially prepared corpse, turning it into an undead mummy bound to the caster's will.

permanentCosts.notes: Permanent loss of 10 P.P.E. to bind the undead entity.

spawnedPresence.notes: The Mummy is permanently loyal to its creator.

duration.summary: Permanent.

name: Talisman
description: Forges a magical battery that can store P.P.E. or specific spells for the caster to tap into later.

entries.label: Flawless gem, skull, or iron rod

forgedOutputs.notes: Can hold up to 50 P.P.E. or 3 specific spells of levels 1-8.

duration.summary: Permanent.

name: Restoration
description: The pinnacle of healing magic. Instantly mends all internal damage, restores all Hit Points and S.D.C., and miraculously regrows severed limbs.

duration.summary: Instant.

name: Annihilate
description: A devastating spell that calls forth anti-matter or pure destructive force, utterly wiping the target out of existence.

range.summary: 100 ft (30.5 m) per level of experience.

duration.summary: Instant.

damage.notes: If target is reduced to 0 or fewer hit points, they are completely vaporized.

name: Dimensional Portal
description: Tears a hole in the fabric of space and time, allowing transit to completely different dimensions, planes of existence, or parallel worlds.

range.summary: A gateway 10x20 ft (3x6 m) opens up to 20 ft (6.1 m) away.

duration.summary: 1 minute (4 melees) per level of experience.

entries.label: Success
entries.effect: Portal opens safely to the intended dimension/world.

entries.label: Off Course
entries.effect: Portal opens to the right dimension, but in a completely random physical location.

entries.label: Catastrophic Failure
entries.effect: Portal opens to a hostile or entirely unknown dimension, or releases a dangerous entity into the caster's world.

name: Reanimate Flesh
description: Animates and controls up to 15 lbs (6 kg) of dead flesh, such as a hand, arm, foot, or jaw.

duration.summary: One hour.

spawnedPresence.name: Reanimated Flesh
spawnedPresence.derivedHealth: 2D4+6 S.D.C. for a human arm; 2D6+4 S.D.C. for a head.

name: The Knowing Candle
description: Enchants a lit candle or flashlight so its flame changes color or brightness depending on its proximity to supernatural creatures, spells, or psychic effects.

duration.summary: 4 melees (1 minute) per level of experience.

entries.label: A lit candle, lantern, or flashlight

name: Bloodward
description: Inscribes a protective symbol onto a person or object using the caster's freshly drawn blood, warding off evil supernatural creatures.

ppe.notes: 5 P.P.E. per hour of its intended duration.

duration.summary: Variable; determined at casting.

save.summary: Save vs Horror Factor 15 to approach.

entries.label: Caster's freshly drawn blood
entries.notes: Drawing the blood causes 1 hit point of damage to the caster.

combatModifiers.notes: Also gives +1 to save vs mind control.

name: Scarlet Pepper
description: Transforms a handful of fire into red crystals. When scattered, the fire created from the crystals inflicts damage and sets fire to flammable substances.

duration.summary: Crystals last 2D10 hours; fire effects are instant.

damage.notes: Sets fire to any flammable substance with which it is in contact.

name: Traitorous Hand
description: Takes control of a part of another person's body, such as a hand, stomach, or tongue, turning it against them.

duration.summary: One melee round (15 seconds) per level of experience.

combatModifiers.notes: Victim loses attacks or actions fighting their own body.

name: Soul in a Bottle
description: Extracts half of the soul (psychic energy) of the victim and stores it in a glass receptacle. Gives the target significant protections but halves their energy pools.

duration.summary: Permanent, until receptacle is broken.

permanentCosts.notes: Target loses half of their P.P.E. and only gains half P.P.E. when leveling up.
Target loses half of their I.S.P. and only gains half I.S.P. when leveling up.

combatModifiers.notes: Skill performance is -10%. Split character cannot Astral Travel.
+5 to save vs illusions, mind control, empathic attacks, and possession.

entries.label: A glass bottle, jar, or similar receptacle

name: Create Zombie
description: Animates a relatively fresh corpse into an undead servant bound to the caster's will.

duration.summary: 24 hours per level of experience (active 10 hours/day).
24 hours per level of experience.

entries.label: Mostly intact corpse (dead less than two weeks)

name: Friend in the Head
description: This spell creates a magical intelligence with its own personality inside the head of the target subject. [cite: 210, 211] It can act as a helpful guide or a tormenting distraction. [cite: 216]

duration.summary: Uncertain; typically a number of days equal to the victim's M.E. [cite: 207, 222]

combatModifiers.notes: If the voice is harmful, all other rolls are -1 and skill performance is -5% (-10% if kept awake). [cite: 218, 219]

name: Fatal Growth
description: The bones of the target person begin to grow very rapidly, expanding, forming spines and spikes, twisting and generally causing all manors of deformity. [cite: 238]

duration.summary: Special: until victim is slain or magic is negated. [cite: 236]

save.summary: Standard (must also save vs pain 16 or higher). [cite: 236, 239]

entries.label: An object intimately associated with the target (blood, wedding ring, etc.) if not in direct sight. [cite: 246]

damage.notes: Exponential damage direct to Hit Points: 1D6 first melee, 2D6 second, 4D6 third, 8D6 fourth, etc., until the body rips apart. [cite: 240, 241, 242]

name: Destroy Undead Flesh
description: Causes a carcass of up to 600 lbs (270 kg) of undead flesh to smolder, crumble and evaporate. [cite: 256, 257]

duration.summary: One melee round per level of experience. [cite: 255]

damage.notes: Damage is inflicted each melee round on undead creatures until a save is made or the spell ends. [cite: 257, 258]

name: Mictlantecutli's Command
description: An extreme method of gaining command over another's magics by flaying the skin from a living victim and wearing it. [cite: 266, 267, 271]

duration.summary: Until the skin is destroyed. [cite: 263]

craftingDuration.summary: One hour beneath the mid-day sun. [cite: 267]

entries.label: A captured, living magician. [cite: 267]
entries.notes: Victim's death provides P.P.E. for the enchantment. [cite: 269]

combatModifiers.notes: Grants access to all spell knowledge known by the deceased, and control over their magical servants/zombies. [cite: 273, 274, 275]

name: Open Pathway
description: Allows a magician to call up and 'open' a Pathway between his current location to any other known location on any other world or plane. [cite: 279]

duration.summary: 1D6 melee rounds (the journey takes several minutes). [cite: 278, 291, 293]

spawnedPresence.name: Pathway Embodiment
spawnedPresence.notes: Pathways are living entities, outside of all planes, with alien minds. [cite: 283, 335, 336]

entries.label: Specific offering (e.g., a silver coin, a child's toy) depending on the individual Pathway. [cite: 308, 322]

name: Psychic Drain
description: This ritual enchants a small object, which draws P.P.E. from the unfortunate target. [cite: 358]

duration.summary: One week. [cite: 357]

entries.label: Object to enchant (e.g., bone knife, crystal sphere). [cite: 359, 360]
Object intimately associated with the target (blood, hair, etc.). [cite: 360]

combatModifiers.notes: Target cannot recover spent P.P.E. while within 1 mile of the object; all recovered P.P.E. is siphoned into it. [cite: 362, 363]

name: Maggots Curse
description: Causes a large nest of maggots to start feeding and multiplying inside the flesh of a living person. [cite: 384]

range.summary: 5 feet (1.5 meters) per level of experience. [cite: 382]

duration.summary: Conditionally, 4 melee rounds per level of experience (requires concentration). [cite: 382, 392]

combatModifiers.notes: Victim must save vs P.E. starting round 2 or fall down writhing. [cite: 386, 387]

damage.notes: Direct to Hit Points (armor ignores): 1D4 round 1; 1D6 round 2; 2D6 round 3 and beyond. [cite: 385, 386, 388, 389, 390]

name: Someone Makes Them
description: Reconstructs the target's personality by going through their mind and restructuring, replacing and deleting all of their memories of their formative experiences. [cite: 375]

duration.summary: Indefinite [cite: 372]

combatModifiers.notes: Can cure or create addictions, change alignment, implant obsessions, or restructure the target's sense of self. [cite: 379]

name: Observe Dream
description: Allows the caster to safely watch the dreams of a sleeping subject as if watching a movie or theatrical play. The caster cannot interfere or interact.

duration.summary: 5 minutes plus 2 minutes per level of experience.

name: Summon & Control Minor Astral Being
description: Tears a brief opening into the Astral Plane to summon a minor astral or dream entity and compel it into service.

duration.summary: One hour per level of experience.

control.summary: Standard save to resist control each hour.

spawnedPresence.notes: Entity will obey commands but, depending on its alignment, may attempt to twist the wording if hostile toward the caster.

name: Dream Window
description: Opens a visible, hovering rift into the Dreamstream, allowing the caster and others to look directly into it. However, it risks allowing entities to escape into the real world.

duration.summary: 1 melee round (15 seconds) per level of experience.

entries.label: Breach
entries.effect: A random dream entity slips through the window into the physical world.

notes: The chance for a creature to escape is 20% and is CUMULATIVE for every melee round the window is kept open (e.g., 20% on round 1, 40% on round 2, 60% on round 3).

name: Circle of Concealment
description: A powerful warding circle that completely hides its contents from normal sight, technological sensors, and mystical/psychic detection.

ppe.notes: 15 P.P.E. for temporary; 100 P.P.E. for permanent.

range.summary: Radius of 5 feet (1.5 m) per level of experience.

duration.summary: Variable based on casting mode.

effectProfiles.name: Temporary Concealment
effectProfiles.description: The circle lasts for one hour per level of the caster's experience.

effectProfiles.name: Permanent Concealment
effectProfiles.description: Requires an infusion of 100 P.P.E. The circle lasts for one year per level of the caster's experience.
